market_context: Market regime is trending_down (Nifty -0.2%, ADX 25.0), which means BUY setups are counter-trend and carry elevated risk. Only 2 setups were found, both BUY-side, which contradicts the bearish regime. Per yesterday's learnings, when setups contradict the regime, we should be extremely selective. TATASTEEL has a higher zone score (50) and trend alignment on its local timeframe, but both are counter-trend to the broader market. Neither setup meets ideal conditions for high-conviction trades in a downtrending market.
